task_completion.description: Open the existing eCRM-001 model in OpenVSP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application window is visible with the eCRM-001_wing_tail model loaded, showing the aircraft wing and tail geometry in the workspace.

task_completion.description: Open the Geometry window for the main Wing component
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Geometry dialog box for the main Wing component is open, with the 'Cross Section' (or 'XSec') tab selected.

task_completion.description: Modify the root cross-section to a Four Series airfoil matching NACA 4415
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Wing's Cross Section tab for the root section (usually index 0 or 1), the Type is set to 'Four Series' and the parameters are set to Camber: 0.04, Camber Loc: 0.4, and Thickness/Chord (T/C): 0.15.

task_completion.description: Modify the outermost tip cross-section to a Four Series airfoil matching NACA 2410
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Wing's Cross Section tab for the outermost tip section, the Type is set to 'Four Series' and the parameters are set to Camber: 0.02, Camber Loc: 0.4, and Thickness/Chord (T/C): 0.10.

task_completion.description: Save the modified model as eCRM001_resectioned.vsp3
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the filename 'eCRM001_resectioned.vsp3' in the /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ directory, or a terminal window confirms the creation of this specific file.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenVSP graphical interface to modify the airfoil parameters
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OpenVSP menus and Geometry dialogs rather than executing a script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to directly modify the XML structure of the .vsp3 file
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening the .vsp3 file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually change the XML tags.

integrity.description: The file was saved through the OpenVSP application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the File > Save As menu in OpenVSP, rather than just copying and renaming the original file in the terminal without modifying it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The root NACA 4415 airfoil requires setting the Four Series parameters to: Camber = 0.04, Camber Loc = 0.4, and Thickness/Chord (T/C) = 0.15. The tip NACA 2410 airfoil requires setting the Four Series parameters to: Camber = 0.02, Camber Loc = 0.4, and Thickness/Chord (T/C) = 0.10. The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_resectioned.vsp3.
